comment: Standalone tsconfig so the bench harness type-checks on its own, independent of the main rag-api build (which has rootDir=./src and excludes this folder). Covers the top-level retrieval runner plus the self-contained retrieval-eval subtree (eval/**). The tribunal/** subtree is excluded: it imports live rag-api services via ../../src and is run with ts-node --transpile-only, not type-checked here. Run: cd rag-api && npx tsc -p bench/tsconfig.json --noEmit
